items.title: Why Analysts Remain Split on Domo, Inc. (DOMO)
items.description: Domo, Inc. (NASDAQ:DOMO) is among the Best Get Rich Fast Stocks to Buy Right Now. On December 24, Tom Blakey from Cantor Fitzgerald assumed coverage on Domo, Inc. (NASDAQ:DOMO) with an ‘Overweight’ rating and a price target of $22, according to TheFly. This reaffirmation follows the firm’s revised research coverage for the Security & Infrastructure Software […]
